content: UNILEVER PLC demonstrates strong credibility on GHG Emissions, with quantified disclosure citing a 72% absolute reduction in Scope 1 & 2 emissions since 2015, supported by a clean regulatory record across EU ETS with no violations detected. Talent signals suggest alignment, though the moderate sample size (n=12) warrants some caution in interpretation. The words-versus-money stream shows no identified monetary commitments against these environmental claims, which neither confirms nor undermines the disclosure but represents a gap worth monitoring.
